# P16 LACMA Gothic Cathedral Semantic Scaffold Data

P16 pivots from raw line-density experiments to semantic reconstruction. The scaffold is curated from P13-P15 measured evidence and visible architectural landmarks.

- Source page: https://collections.lacma.org/node/229641
- Source image URL: https://collections-images.lacma.org/images/13736/13736-1-primary.webp
- Source file: `SourceAssets/Reference/PerspectiveDrawing/WebReferences/REF_Perspective_GothicCathedral_LACMA_229641.webp`
- Solved full-image VP used: `(0.607642, 0.621035)`
- Floor grid rays: `10`
- Floor cross rows: `9`
- Column centerlines: `10`
- Central arch envelopes: `5`
- Side arch envelopes: `5`
- Vault rib curves: `6`
- Bay spacing cross sections: `7`

## Detail Crops

- Floor Grid: `(0.05, 0.54, 0.96, 0.985)` - tile-corner anchors and receding floor spacing
- Column And Arcade: `(0.12, 0.07, 0.98, 0.84)` - vertical shaft centers, bases, capitals, and side arcade rhythm
- Central Nave: `(0.4, 0.12, 0.77, 0.84)` - nested arch envelopes and repeated bay spacing
- Vault Ribs: `(0.24, 0.02, 0.86, 0.58)` - upper rib curves and overhead convergence
